queries.question: What time does the Early Bird programme start?
What is the process for authorising a new person to collect my child from school?
queries.note: Procedure in §2.7 Authorisation for Students to Leave or Be Picked Up Alone

queries.question: Who is allowed to collect my child from school if they fall ill and I cannot be reached?
queries.note: Cross-section: §9.1 (illness → contact family ASAP; if unreachable, contact emergency person on file) + §2.7 (Phidias pick-up authorisation — only registered parents/guardians or explicitly authorised persons). Answer requires combining illness-response procedure with pick-up authorisation rules.
